item.title: Mastering std::set in C++
item.description: The std::set container in C++ is part of the Standard Template Library (STL) and is used to store unique elements in a sorted order. It’s a powerful associative container when you need quick lookups, automatic sorting, and no duplicate values. Watch on YouTube Key Characteristics Stores only unique elements (duplicates are not allowed). Sorted order of elements (by default, ascending). Fast search, insertion, and deletion — average O(log n) complexity.
